title: chart_v1
description: Lane-agnostic beat chart stored in radio_tracks.chart_v1 (jsonb). The game client derives easy/medium/hard at runtime from this single object — do NOT store per-difficulty charts.

version.description: Schema version. Bump only on breaking changes; game checks this.

bpm.description: Estimated tempo (inter-onset-interval histogram). Informational; gameplay does not require it.

beats.description: Detected bass/kick onsets in chronological order. This is the chart.

t.description: Onset time in seconds from track start, rounded to 3 decimals (ms).

strength.description: Strength = peak energy / local mean, clamped 0..3, rounded to 2 decimals. Drives note size + which beats survive density filtering on easier difficulties.

stats.description: Optional QA metadata — lets you flag bad analyses without replaying.
